shots.title: Farm before sunrise
shots.visual: Aerial farm geometry emerges from black.
shots.caption: Before there was water, there was land.
shots.audioDescription: Before sunrise, a large farm surrounds a farmhouse and pond.

shots.title: White milking bay
shots.visual: A white milking structure glows in blue-gray dawn.
shots.caption: My mother and father had a dairy farm.
shots.audioDescription: Cattle file toward a white milking building in the cold dawn.

shots.title: Child at the doorway
shots.visual: A small child watches the living farm from a doorway.
shots.caption: Somebody else was holding the whole world together.
shots.audioDescription: A small child watches from the open farmhouse door.

shots.title: Frozen grade
shots.visual: Ice coats the grade to the milking bay.
shots.caption: The cows still had to be milked.
shots.audioDescription: A woman slips on an icy slope behind moving cattle.

shots.title: Take the tail
shots.visual: A gloved hand holds the trusted cow's tail.
shots.caption: There was a certain cow she could depend on.
shots.audioDescription: A gloved hand closes gently around a cow's tail.

shots.title: Pulled uphill
shots.visual: The cow pulls the slipping woman into warm barn light.
shots.caption: The cow pulled her toward the milking place.
shots.audioDescription: The cow steadily pulls the slipping woman uphill.

shots.title: Hay rows
shots.visual: A green tractor follows long hay rows.
shots.caption: Nothing existed completely by itself.
shots.audioDescription: A green tractor works long rows of cut hay.

shots.title: Milking line
shots.visual: Cows stand in a practical milking line.
shots.caption: Everything living needed attention.
shots.audioDescription: Cows stand side by side in a working milking line.

shots.title: Dust in sunlight
shots.visual: A child's fingers brush hay as dust rises.
shots.caption: A little boy standing in the middle of a system.
shots.audioDescription: A child's hand brushes hay as dust glows in sunlight.

shots.title: An open door
shots.visual: A woman welcomes an anonymous traveler into the farmhouse.
shots.caption: She saw someone who needed help and opened the door.
shots.audioDescription: A woman welcomes a tired stranger into the farmhouse.

shots.title: Everybody sick
shots.visual: The family lies beneath blankets throughout the living room.
shots.caption: Then the whole family got sick.
shots.audioDescription: Blanketed family members fill the living room, coughing.

shots.title: Porch guided missile
shots.visual: A firework ricochets beneath the porch as everyone scatters.
shots.caption: The world's cheapest guided missile.
shots.audioDescription: A bouncing firework sends everyone running from the porch.

shots.title: Cat versus hallway
shots.visual: A small cat slides into a closed door.
shots.caption: Gravity remained undefeated.
shots.audioDescription: A small cat slides along the hallway and bumps softly into a door.

shots.title: Cat versus television
shots.visual: The cat slowly slides down an old television.
shots.caption: No phone. No algorithm.
shots.audioDescription: The cat slowly slides down the front of an old television.

shots.title: Mask to fire
shots.visual: A skeleton mask dissolves into a controlled fire.
shots.caption: The mask was finally burned.
shots.audioDescription: A frightening skeleton mask dissolves into flames.

shots.title: The family PC
shots.visual: A mother and child lean toward a glowing old computer.
shots.caption: Before Quake, there was Myst on the family PC.
shots.audioDescription: A mother and child sit together before a glowing old computer.

shots.title: Island doorway
shots.visual: The CRT opens into abstract gears, water and impossible architecture.
shots.caption: It felt like a place waiting to be understood.
shots.audioDescription: The computer screen opens into a dreamlike reconstructed island.

shots.title: Shared discovery
shots.visual: Mother and child share a smile in the computer light.
shots.caption: One of the first digital doors opened together.
shots.audioDescription: Mother and child share a smile in the computer's light.

shots.title: Truck at dawn
shots.visual: A red short-bed pickup waits outside the farmhouse.
shots.caption: Morning rides to junior high.
shots.audioDescription: A red short-bed pickup idles outside the farmhouse at dawn.

shots.title: Game-piece breakfast
shots.visual: Two brothers eat breakfast and examine a generic game piece.
shots.caption: Every little game piece might change our lives.
shots.audioDescription: The brothers eat breakfast in the parked truck and examine a game piece.

shots.title: School drop-off
shots.visual: The red pickup leaves the school entrance.
shots.caption: Years later, memory kept him there.
shots.audioDescription: The child watches the red pickup leave the school entrance.

shots.title: Leaving for school
shots.visual: A school-dressed child passes three sleeping bags.
shots.caption: They were pretending to be asleep.
shots.audioDescription: A school-dressed child passes three sleeping bags on the way to the door.

shots.title: Something in the shoe
shots.visual: The child pulls a dead snake from his shoe.
shots.caption: There was a dead snake in the shoe.
shots.audioDescription: He pulls a dead snake from his shoe and recoils.

shots.title: Too big to beat up
shots.visual: A much larger brother holds the furious child at arm's length.
shots.caption: He could not win, but he tried.
shots.audioDescription: The much larger brother laughs and holds the furious child at arm's length.

shots.title: What remains
shots.visual: A present-day field stands where dairy structures once stood.
shots.caption: The farm became a place mostly reached through memory.
shots.audioDescription: An empty field remains where the dairy structures once stood.

shots.title: Sound bridge
shots.visual: Grass in wind dissolves into sunlight on lake water.
shots.caption: The land opened into water.
shots.audioDescription: Wind through grass dissolves into rippling lake water.

shots.title: Lake reveal
shots.visual: A broad East Texas lake opens beneath a clean sky.
shots.caption: Lake O' the Pines.
shots.audioDescription: A broad East Texas lake stretches beneath a clear sky.

shots.title: Boat at the dock
shots.visual: A white classic ski boat with blue-teal striping rocks beside a dock.
shots.caption: A boat built to pull someone out of stillness.
shots.audioDescription: A white and blue classic ski boat rocks beside the dock.

shots.title: Rope in hand
shots.visual: A child's hands tighten around a tow rope as the driver looks back.
shots.caption: Pulled forward by somebody trusted.
shots.audioDescription: The child grips a tow rope as the driver checks on him from the boat.

shots.title: Across the water
shots.visual: The child glides across sparkling water behind the boat.
shots.caption: Sunlight. Water. Rope. Engine. Trust.
shots.audioDescription: The child glides behind the boat across sparkling open water.
